common.sessionExpired: Session expired, please log in again

dashboard.label: // CONSOLE
dashboard.noAlbums: NO ALBUMS — ADD A STORAGE SOURCE TO START SCANNING

cronWarning.title: ⚠ Cron schedules empty
cronWarning.message: This Cloudflare Worker currently has no scheduled triggers. Podcast refresh, incremental scans, and stale-work reclaim won't run automatically. Open Settings → Cloudflare integration and click 'Ensure default cron' to restore the hourly cadence. As a short-term workaround, the Maintenance tools panel also has a manual reclaim button.
cronWarning.unconfiguredMessage: CF_API_TOKEN / CF_ACCOUNT_ID are not set, so the dashboard cannot read or modify the cron schedule. Existing features keep working, but you won't be able to recover the hourly cron after a redeploy without these credentials. Configure them in Settings → Cloudflare integration.

r2Presign.title: R2 streams go through the Worker
r2Presign.message: R2 presigned direct-stream is not active (enable_r2_presign is off or R2 S3 secrets are not configured). R2 streams currently pass through the Worker sub-request channel and can be throttled to ~1.2 MB/s under concurrency. Enabling presign lets the browser fetch R2 bytes directly, bypassing the sub-request bandwidth pool. See Settings → Feature Strings + SECRETS.md §4.

workPool.title: Work Pool
workPool.loadFailed: Failed to load work pool status

library.title: Library
library.noArtists: NO ARTISTS FOUND — ADD A STORAGE SOURCE FIRST
library.playbackFailed: Unable to play {title}; skipping to the next track
library.artistInfoUnavailable: Artist information is unavailable. Configure a Last.fm API key to enable it.
library.editHint: Changes update the library immediately and are written back into mp3/flac files on R2 and WebDAV sources.
library.noPlaylists: No playlists yet — create one first
library.songsHint: 💡 Hover song row to edit (✎) · Multi-select for batch edit
library.batchHint: Check rows to batch (edit tags / playlist / share)
library.locateLoadMore: The current track is not loaded. Click again to search the remaining library.
library.locateNotFound: Current track was not found in this library
library.locateNotLiked: Current track is not in your liked songs
library.locateLoadMore: The current track is not loaded. Click again to search the remaining library.
library.locateNotFound: Current track was not found in this library
library.locateNotLiked: Current track is not in your liked songs

tagEditor.hintSingle: Changes update the library immediately and are written back into mp3/flac files on R2 and WebDAV sources.
tagEditor.hintBatch: Only ticked fields are written; un-ticked fields stay as they are.
tagEditor.batchHint: Tick the ☐ on the left to apply that field to every selected track.
tagEditor.coverPlaceholder: Cover write-back will land in a later task
tagEditor.lyricsKeywords: Keywords: {null} clear · {write} write library lyrics back into file · {export} export as same-name .lrc
tagEditor.coverKeywords: Cover keywords: {write} write album cover into file · {export} export cover.jpg

cover.dropHint: Drop or click to pick a cover (JPEG / PNG, auto-compressed to ≤500KB)
cover.errTooLarge: Cover still exceeds 500KB after compression ({kb} KB)
cover.errNoAlbumCover: This album has no cover to write
cover.writeHint: Write the album cover (D1 album.cover_r2_key) back into the file's embedded APIC/PICTURE
cover.exportHint: Export the album cover to cover.jpg in the song's directory
cover.current: Current cover · click or drop to replace

scrape.hint: Sources: {sources} (auto-proxied via the Worker when CORS blocks the browser).
scrape.allSourcesFailed: All sources failed — see source-specific errors above.
scrape.disabled: Metadata scraping is disabled in Settings.

files.label: // MANAGEMENT
files.title: File Browser
files.browserReadNothing: No browser-parseable files in this folder
files.pendingBadgeTitle: tag_scanned=0 instances from the incremental scan — press BROWSER READ to drain
files.deleteConfirmBatch: Delete these {n} files? This cannot be undone.
files.deleteConfirmFolder: Delete folder "{name}" and everything inside it? This cannot be undone.
files.deleteConfirmMixed: Delete {files} file(s) and {dirs} folder(s) (folders are deleted recursively)? This cannot be undone.
files.destInsideSelf: Cannot move a folder into itself or its subfolders
files.filesOnlyAction: Not available while folders are selected
files.editLookupFailed: Not yet in the library — run READ TAGS first
files.editBatchPartial: {n} file(s) couldn't be matched to a library entry, skipped
files.tidyEmpty: None of the selected files could be resolved (scan tags first)
files.crossCopyDestDirHint: Directory only — each file is copied under it keeping its original name.

player.selectSong: Select a song in the library

tools.label: SYSTEM / TOOLS
tools.title: Tools
tools.signInRequired: Sign in to use the tools

account.title: Account
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters

common.title: Common
common.languageDesc: Display language of the web console
common.themeDesc: Choose the interface accent color style

externalTheme.title: External Themes
externalTheme.desc: Load a theme module from a URL. This runs that URL's JavaScript in EdgeSonic — only load themes you wrote or explicitly trust.

common.apiUnavailable: Feature API unavailable — backend may not be deployed yet (getFeatures)

scrape.title: Metadata Scrape Sources
scrape.desc: Pick which external providers the editor's Scrape button queries, and in what order. Direct browser requests usually fail CORS; all sources route through the Worker proxy.

lastfm.title: Last.fm
lastfm.userDesc: Connect your Last.fm account to read your play history, loved tracks and top tracks. Requires your own Last.fm API key (below) plus your Last.fm username — this is fully isolated from the system-level key, it is never shared. Read-only — scrobble / love are not supported.
lastfm.userApiKeyDesc: Required for the personal read paths above (recent/loved/top tracks, profile). Isolated from the system-level key — leaving this empty means those paths stay unavailable, they do not fall back to the system key.
lastfm.systemDesc: API key shared by all users. Powers the Subsonic getArtistInfo / getAlbumInfo / getSimilarSongs / getTopSongs endpoints only — isolated from the per-user key above, it is never used for a user's personal recent/loved/top tracks. Empty disables Last.fm as an artist-info source and the album/similar/topSongs endpoints (Subsonic returns error 30).
lastfm.fallbackDesc: Where artist biography/cover come from, tried top to bottom until one hits. Last.fm is not primary by default — CN sources (NetEase/QQ Music) usually have far better coverage for CN artists, so they're ranked first; last.fm is available but ranked last unless you reorder it. Toggle each source and drag its priority with the arrows. CN matches are high-confidence only (search result name must match the queried artist).
lastfm.scrapeIntervalDesc: A cron job periodically scans artists missing biography / cover and fills them from the enabled CN sources, so getArtistInfo stays fast on hot path (no live scrape).
lastfm.scrapeIntervalHint: 0 = disabled; 1 = every cron tick; N>1 = every N hours. Default 24.

sync.title: Peer Sync
sync.desc: Mirror your stars and playlists to one other Subsonic-compatible server. Outbound changes push immediately; inbound changes pull hourly. Songs are matched by title + artist, so IDs need not match.

scope.title: Playlists to sync
scope.desc: Which playlists mirror to the peer. Both sides must pick the same scope for a clean two-way mirror; otherwise each side filters independently.

scan.title: Scan Settings
scan.desc: WebDAV incremental scan cadence + browser-side metadata queue. The Cloudflare cron ticks hourly; intervals >1 are gated via KV cron:last_scan_ts.
scan.intervalHoursDesc: 0 = disabled; 1 = run every cron tick; N>1 = run every N hours.
scan.etagCheckDesc: Skip files whose (ETag + lastModified + size) triple matches the stored snapshot. Disable to force a full re-import on every scan.
scan.strategyDesc: auto: Worker handles mp3/flac/wav, others fall through to the browser; worker: Worker only; browser: always browser.
scan.browserAutoDesc: When Files page is visible, automatically run BROWSER READ on pending items. Each item costs one /rest/stream download — be careful on cellular.

crossOriginIsolation.title: Cross-Origin Isolation (COOP/COEP)
crossOriginIsolation.hint: Enables SharedArrayBuffer so the browser worker pool can run ffmpeg.wasm multi-thread. The Worker stamps Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin, Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin on every response. May break cross-origin image embeds you have hand-wired — turn off as a quick rollback.
crossOriginIsolation.toggleDesc: Off restores the default headers immediately; on takes effect on the next response (you may need to reload to flip crossOriginIsolated in this tab).

presign.title: Presigned URL Direct Stream
presign.hint: 302-redirect /rest/stream to a short-lived R2 S3 / WebDAV UserInfo URL so the browser fetches bytes directly, bypassing the Worker sub-request bandwidth pool. R2 egress is free; WebDAV streams benefit most (no Worker binding fast path).
presign.r2SecretsMissingHint: R2 presign is OFF because the two R2 S3 secrets (and/or CF_ACCOUNT_ID from the Cloudflare integration block) are not set. Without them the stream endpoint falls back to the in-Worker proxy even when the flag is on.
presign.secretPushHint: Push them via `wrangler secret put <NAME>` — see worker/SECRETS.md §3 for the walkthrough.
presign.r2ToggleDesc: Off keeps the in-Worker stream path. On without secrets silently falls back to the in-Worker path.
presign.webdavToggleDesc: Default on. Per-credential stream_proxy_strategy (always/never/r2_only/webdav_only) still gates which clients opt in.

cf.title: Cloudflare Integration
cf.desc: Push the Cloudflare API token into Workers Secrets, manage cron schedules dynamically, and read 24h Worker analytics. Token never leaves CF's secret store. Requires super admin.
cf.tokenPlaceholder: Paste a token with Workers Scripts:Edit, Account Analytics:Read, Account Settings:Read
cf.saved: CF token saved — env will refresh on the next request
cf.cronHint: Replaces all Worker schedules. Leave empty to clear.
cf.ensureCronDesc: Re-applies the default hourly schedule (0 */1 * * *) when the live schedules list is empty. Leaves an existing custom cadence untouched.
cf.ensureCronWarning: wrangler deploy clears Worker schedules. After every deploy, click this to restore the default cron.

workerPool.title: Worker Pool
workerPool.desc: Logged-in users with write permission (level ≥ 2) can become a browser worker node: every 5 minutes the tab polls /edgesonic/work/poll and posts results back. Runs only while the tab is visible.
workerPool.participateDesc: Local toggle. When off, polling stops immediately. Task routing is decided by the server based on detected capabilities.
workerPool.ineligible: Your level cannot participate in the worker pool (requires level ≥ 2).
workerPool.backfillDesc: Replay every status=completed task_type=metadata row's result into song_masters / song_instances. Repairs historical tasks that completed but were never applied before fix 077. Idempotent.
workerPool.recheckDesc: Immediately dispatch a browser-pool re-scan for songs the embedded parser couldn't recognize (other formats), songs already scanned but still missing lyrics/disc despite the album having a cover, and WAV files with an implausibly short duration (likely leftover from the pre-fix truncated parse). Each issue type is dispatched for a given song at most once. Runs automatically every 24h by default — adjust or disable below.
workerPool.recheckDoneToast: Dispatched {dispatched} (unsupported format {unsupported} + lyrics/disc incomplete {incomplete} + implausible WAV duration {badDuration})
workerPool.lrcBackfillDesc: Scan every song still missing lyrics for a sibling .lrc file next to its audio source and fill it in (094's sidecar check only fires at scan time for brand-new files or when a client actually requests lyrics — pre-existing library songs are never retroactively checked). Runs automatically every 24h by default — adjust or disable below.

maintenance.title: Maintenance tools
maintenance.desc: One-shot DB cleanup utilities, all idempotent and safe to re-run. Super-admin only.
maintenance.cleanupCoversDesc: For albums sharing the same cover_r2_key, keep the oldest id and clear the rest. R2 objects are NOT deleted; freed albums will re-resolve their own cover on next access (post-074 logic).
maintenance.reclaimDesc: Scans work_queue for claimed rows whose heartbeat is older than worker_claim_ttl_seconds: rows under max_attempts go back to 'queued', rows at the limit go to 'failed'. Mirrors the 052a scheduled sweep but runs on demand — especially handy when CF cron schedules are empty.
maintenance.reclaimHint: If CF cron is configured (Cloudflare integration → schedules non-empty), this button is normally unnecessary.
maintenance.resetFailedDesc: Flip every work_queue row with status='failed' back to 'queued' (attempts=0, clear error / claimed_*), letting browser workers dispatch them again.
maintenance.resetFailedHint: Before resetting, make sure your browser workers are on the latest bundle (see the update banner at the top) so they don't immediately fail again.
maintenance.resetFailedConfirm: Re-queue every failed task? Make sure your browser workers are running the latest bundle first.

clone.title: Clone Subsonic server
clone.desc: Mirror an upstream Subsonic server's library into this EdgeSonic instance. The browser drives the clone — it fetches metadata + bytes directly from the upstream and writes them back here, so large libraries don't time out the Worker.
clone.urlDesc: Base URL of the upstream Subsonic server (no /rest suffix).
clone.passwordPlaceholder: Subsonic password (plaintext — required for token auth)
clone.metadataToggleDesc: When on, clone upstream album/song metadata (title/artist/year/…). Turn off for a re-run that only needs to top up starred/playlists/user accounts without re-walking the whole library.
clone.audioToggleDesc: When on, each song's /stream bytes are fetched from upstream and written to local R2 under music/ (following the upstream original path; pick the fetch mode below). Off = metadata only.
clone.audioModeBrowserDesc: The browser downloads upstream bytes then re-uploads them to EdgeSonic — more resilient on flaky upstreams, but spends your own bandwidth downloading and uploading every song once each.
clone.audioModeWorkerDesc: The EdgeSonic Worker fetches bytes straight from upstream into R2 — bytes never touch this browser, saving your bandwidth, but it relies on the Worker's own outbound request and is less forgiving of a slow or unstable upstream.

userMode.label: Clone to
userMode.currentDesc: Clone the upstream account's favourites/playlists into your own current account.
userMode.specifiedDesc: Clone the upstream account's favourites/playlists into a specified local user (requires manage-users).
userMode.allDesc: Clone every upstream user account and write each user's favourites/playlists into their matching local account (requires super-admin, and the upstream must support getUsers).

clone.filterDesc: The two filters are a union: tick either to include it; tick both to clone (songs in playlists ∪ starred songs).
clone.needManageUsers: Cloning into a specified user requires manage-users
clone.cacheHint: Local cache: {metadata} metadata / {audio} audio item(s) already done — resuming will skip them
clone.cacheCleared: Local cache cleared — next clone will start from scratch
clone.missingFields: Upstream URL, username and password are required

push.title: Push to upstream
push.desc: Write local stars and playlists back to the upstream server: songs are matched via upstream search3 with cleaned titles (leading track numbers stripped) and only written when the combined title/artist/duration confidence is high enough; playlists whose name already exists upstream are skipped.

transcode.title: Transcoder
transcode.engineDesc: Backend that actually runs ffmpeg. Set to disabled to turn transcoding off entirely.
transcode.modeDesc: on_demand transcodes on /stream; pre_bake at upload; both combines.
transcode.profilesDesc: Targets used for pre-bake (pre_bake / both modes).

audioCache.title: Audio Cache
audioCache.desc: Fully played tracks are cached in this browser (IndexedDB), so replays start instantly without using the network.
audioCache.unavailable: Audio cache is unavailable in this browser.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.desc: Active login sessions for this account
sessions.confirmRevoke: Revoke this session? You will be logged out if it is the current one.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.denied: ONLY SUPER ADMINS CAN MANAGE PERMISSIONS

clients.title: Subsonic Clients
clients.desc: Issue long-lived credentials for native Subsonic apps (DSub, Symfonium…). They can stream and browse, but can never touch files or admin.
clients.labelTooLong: Label must be 200 chars or fewer

sources.label: // MANAGEMENT
sources.title: Storage Sources
sources.rootPathHint: Optional — scan starts from this subdirectory, e.g. /music

mirror.confirm: Copy all unmirrored files from "{name}" to R2? Runs from this browser tab (a few files at a time) so the Worker never times out — keep this tab open until it finishes.
mirror.none: Nothing to mirror (everything is already on R2)

sources.passwordPlaintextHint: Password is still in the legacy plaintext column. Push STORAGE_KEY and run "Migrate plaintext passwords".
sources.migrateHint: Bulk-encrypt every remaining legacy password under STORAGE_KEY. One-way.
sources.migrateConfirm: Encrypt every remaining plaintext password? This cannot be undone, and the legacy password column is blanked after each row is rewritten.
sources.s3RegionHint: Any value for MinIO; 'auto' for R2

mode.label: Mode
mode.hint: Sync-only sources are not indexed into the library; use as cross-source copy targets.

cacheTier.label: Cache tier
cacheTier.hint: Copies files to R2 on first play for faster replays. Standard = small budget, kept longer. Extended = larger budget and per-file cap, but a short TTL — not for long-term storage. Old cached files are evicted automatically to make room for new ones.

scanStatus.forceRescanHint: Ignore ETag cache and re-read metadata for every file in this source

sources.presignCredsHint: Configure a read-only WebDAV account for presigned direct URLs to avoid exposing write credentials

radio.label: // radio directory
radio.title: Internet Radio
radio.empty: No stations — click "Add station" to get started
radio.name: Name
radio.homepageClearHint: Leave empty to clear the homepage
radio.requiredMissing: Name and stream URL are required

podcasts.label: // podcast subscriptions
podcasts.title: Podcasts
podcasts.subtitle: {n} channels subscribed
podcasts.urlHint: Paste the podcast's RSS / Atom feed URL
podcasts.urlInvalid: Invalid URL — must start with http(s)://
podcasts.refreshTriggered: Refresh triggered, list will update shortly
podcasts.empty: No subscriptions yet — click "Subscribe" to begin
podcasts.episodesEmpty: No episodes yet — waiting for RSS sync…
podcasts.downloadTriggered: Download started, status will update shortly
podcasts.confirmDeleteChannel: Delete channel "{title}"? All episodes will be removed.

shares.label: // public shares
shares.title: Shares
shares.empty: No shares yet — click "New share" to create one
shares.searchSongHint: Type a song title or artist…
shares.searchAlbumHint: Type an album name or artist…
shares.confirmDelete: Delete this share? The public URL will stop working immediately.

playlists.label: // playlists
playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.empty: No playlists yet — click "New playlist" to create one
playlists.name: Name
playlists.confirmDelete: Delete playlist "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
playlists.noSongs: This playlist has no tracks yet

update.title: Update available
update.message: Refresh to load the latest features and fixes

about.tagline: Subsonic-compatible music streaming server on Cloudflare Workers
about.about_desc: EdgeSonic is an open-source, self-hosted music streaming server built on Cloudflare Workers.
about.source_code: All source code is available on
about.license_desc: This means that if you modify and use EdgeSonic over a network, you must make your modifications available to other users under the same license.
about.credits_desc: EdgeSonic is inspired by these excellent open-source projects:
about.compatibility_desc: EdgeSonic implements the Subsonic REST API (v1.16.1) and extends it with
about.powered_by: EdgeSonic is built with these excellent open-source projects:

demo.uploadCap: Upload size is capped in demo mode
